meta.title: DevCraft Studio — full-stack development
meta.description: DevCraft Studio builds landing pages, Telegram bots and web services. End-to-end: design, backend, deployment.

hero.sub: Landing pages, Telegram bots, FastAPI web services. End-to-end delivery: from idea and design to deployment and analytics. Clean code, fast turnaround, no boilerplate.

services.title: Services
services.lead: Three directions, one stack. I pick the right tool for the job — not the other way around.

1.title: Landing pages & business cards
1.text: Responsive layout, clean code, instant load. Mobile-first, cross-browser, SEO-ready.

2.title: Telegram bots
2.text: From a simple FAQ bot to complex systems with payments, CRM integration and admin panel.

3.title: Web services & APIs
3.text: FastAPI/Django backend with REST, auth, PostgreSQL and Docker deployment.

work.title: Projects
work.lead: Live projects — open source on GitHub. Inspect the code, deploy it, fork it.

1.title: Fintess — fitness coach
1.text: Responsive landing with class booking and Telegram integration.

2.title: LeadFlow — leads CRM
2.text: FastAPI + PostgreSQL web service with Telegram notifications.

3.title: OrderBot — order intake
3.text: aiogram 3 Telegram bot with FSM, payments and admin panel.

4.title: Polyglot UI
4.text: UI kit with RU/EN/DE/ES/FR switching without page reload.

1.title: Brief
1.text: We discuss goals, audience, timelines. No 20-page specs — a chat is enough.

2.title: Prototype
2.text: In 1–2 days I show structure and style. We align down to the pixel.

3.title: Build
3.text: Clean code, regular demos. You see progress every day.

4.title: Launch
4.text: Deploy, set up domain, analytics, hand over credentials.

contact.title: Tell me about your project
contact.lead: I reply within 2 hours during business time. No spam — only relevant.

form.name: Name
form.success: Thanks! I'll be in touch within 2 hours.
form.queued: Saved — I'll send it at first opportunity.
form.errFill: Please fill in all fields correctly

footer.tagline: Full-stack development. Landing pages, bots, APIs.
